# Proposal Formatter (Uplizd) - Automated conversion of text proposals into professional slide decks

## Summary
The Proposal Formatter by Uplizd streamlines the transition from raw text drafts to polished, client-ready presentations. By leveraging AI-driven document analysis and automated slide creation, this workflow eliminates manual formatting bottlenecks, ensuring consistent branding and professional layout for every sales proposal.

---

## Demo
![Proposal Formatter workflow showing text input being processed into Google Slides](image.png)
**Alt text (SEO-ready):** Uplizd Proposal Formatter workflow automating document-to-slide conversion using AI and Composio integrations.
